title: Collection Stylized Rocket Ship Icons Black Line
sourceTitle: Collection Stylized Rocket Ship Icons Black Line
prompt: A collection of stylized rocket ship icons in a black line art style on a white background. Each rocket has a unique design, featuring different fin shapes, nose cones, and body details such as circles, lines, and dots. Flames are depicted at the base of the visible rockets, suggesting they are in flight. The overall composition is clean and minimalist, with a focus on the distinct shapes of the spacecraft. --ar 4:5 --raw --profile wwv4ayk bo26j53 4l8ndfd --stylize 250 --hd
